title: US stock market today hits new records as Nasdaq crossed 25,000 for the very first time: Dow Jones, S&P 50
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The US stock market hit new records today with the Nasdaq crossing 25,000 for the first time. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 also reached new highs.
excerpt: The US stock market hit new records today with the Nasdaq crossing 25,000 for the first time. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 also reached new highs.

content.introduction: The US stock market hit new records today with the Nasdaq crossing 25,000 for the first time. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 also reached new highs.
body: Nasdaq ends above 25,000 for first time ever as stocks kick off May with records ... The stock has hit a new all-time high. NDX+0.94% US500
The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 115.00 to 48,578.72, and the Nasdaq composite gained 86.69 to 24,102.70. In stock markets abroad, indexes
Stock indexes settled mostly higher on Friday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 posting new all-time highs. Intel rose more than +23% to a record
keyTakeaways: The US stock market hit new records today with the Nasdaq crossing 25,000 for the first time. The Dow Jones and S&P 500
Nasdaq ends above 25,000 for first time ever as stocks kick off May with records .
